title: Apparatus for generating a technical application property using a quantum computer
abstract: The invention refer to an apparatus for generating a property associated with a chemical product. A representation providing unit provides a molecular structure representation, A partitioning unit partitions the molecular structure representation into two or more sub-representations based on a geometric and/or electronic partitioning. A solution determination unit causes a quantum computer to generate a solution for a sub-representation and a classical computer to generate a solution for the remaining sub-representations. An intermediate property computation unit generates an intermediate property by combining the solution of the sub-representations, wherein an intermediate property is an electronic property of the electronic structure. A generation unit generates a property based on the intermediate property.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS 1. An apparatus for generating a technical application property associated with a chem- ical product, wherein the chemical product is associated with one or more molecular struc- tures, wherein the apparatus comprises: - a molecular structure representation providing unit for providing a molecular struc- ture representation associated with a molecular structure of the chemical product, - a partitioning unit for partitioning the molecular structure representation into two or more sub-representations, wherein the partitioning is associated with a geometric and/or electronic partitioning of the molecular structure represented by the molecular structure representation, - an intermediate solution determination unit for causing a quantum computer to gen- erate and provide a quantum computational solution for at least one of the two or more sub-representations and for causing a classical computer to generate and pro- vide a classical computational solution for the remaining one or more sub-represen- tations, - an intermediate property computation unit for generating one or more intermediate properties associated with the molecular structure by combining the solution of the two or more sub-representations, wherein an intermediate property is an electronic property of the electronic structure of the molecular structure, - a property generation unit for generating a technical application property associated with the chemical product based on one or more intermediate properties, wherein the technical application property refers to a measurable chemical and/or physical quantity associated with the molecular structure, and - a providing unit for providing the technical application property. 2. The apparatus according to claim 1, wherein the partitioning comprises identifying based on the molecular structure representation the most relevant molecular structural part with respect to the technical application property and partitioning the molecular structure representation such that one sub-representation is associated with the most relevant mo- lecular structural part and is solvable in a quantum computation, wherein the intermediate 

property computation unit is configured to cause the quantum computer to generate and provide a quantum computational solution for the sub-representation associated with the most relevant molecular structural part. 3. The apparatus according to claim 2, wherein the most relevant molecular structural part is associated with a most relevant geometrical part of the molecular structure and the partitioning refers to a geometric partitioning. 4. The apparatus according to claim 2, wherein the most relevant molecular structural part is associated with the most relevant electronic structure part of the molecular structure and wherein the partitioning refers to an electronic partitioning. 5. The apparatus according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the partitioning comprises determining the most relevant geometrical part of the molecular structure, gen- erating an electronic structure representation of the most relevant geometrical part and determining the most relevant electronic structural part of the electronic structure represen- tation of the most relevant geometrical part as sub-representation such that the sub-repre- sentation is solvable in a quantum computation, wherein the intermediate property compu- tation unit is configured to cause the quantum computer to generate and provide a quantum computational solution for the sub-representation associated with the most relevant elec- tronic structural part of the most relevant geometrical part. 6. The apparatus according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the one or more intermediate properties are associated with one or more of an electron density, an electro- static multipole moment, an energy of an electronic state, an excited-state property, and a derivative of a ground-state or excited-state energy. 7. The apparatus according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the technical ap- plication property is associated with one or more spectroscopic properties of the molecular structure, wherein the generated intermediate properties are associated with energies of electronic states of the molecular structure. 8. The apparatus according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the technical ap- plication property is associated with a thermodynamic and/or kinetic reaction property of a chemical reaction involving one or more chemical products, wherein one or more interme- 

diate properties are generated for the molecular structures of the involved chemical prod- ucts, wherein the one or more intermediate properties are associated with one or more energies of electronic states. 9. The apparatus according to claim 8, wherein the determination of the thermodynamic and/or kinetic reaction properties of the chemical reaction comprises determining a vibra- tional zero point energy and vibrational partition function for the respective molecular struc- tures based on the one or more energies of electronic states as intermediate properties, wherein the thermodynamic and/or kinetic reaction properties are determined further based on the vibrational zero point energy and the vibrational partition function. 10. The apparatus according to any of claims 8 and 9, wherein at least one of the in- volved chemical products is in solution and wherein one or more intermediate properties generated for the at least one involved chemical product in solution are further determined based on an electron density. 11. The apparatus according to any of the proceeding claims, wherein the apparatus further comprises a surrogate property model providing unit, wherein the surrogate property model providing unit is configured to provide a machine learning based surrogate property model, wherein the machine learning based surrogate property model is trained based on a historical training data set to generate the technical application property based on one or more intermediate properties, wherein the property generating unit is configured to deter- mine a technical application property by providing one or more intermediate properties as input to the surrogate property model and receiving a technical application property as out- put of the surrogate property model. 12. The apparatus according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the apparatus fur- ther comprises a control unit for providing control signals based on the generated technical application property for monitoring, controlling, producing and/or processing of chemical products. 13. System for generating a technical application property associated with a chemical product, wherein the system comprises: - an apparatus according to any of the preceding claims, - a quantum computer communicatively coupled to the apparatus, and 

- a classical computer coupled to the apparatus, wherein the apparatus is configured to control the quantum computer and the clas- sical computer to generate quantum computational solutions and classical computational solutions, respectively. 14. A method, in particular, a computer implemented method, for generating a technical application property associated with a chemical product, wherein the chemical product is associated with one or more molecular structures, wherein the method comprises: - providing a molecular structure representation associated with a molecular structure of the chemical product, - partitioning the molecular structure representation into two or more sub-representa- tions, wherein the partitioning is associated with a geometric and/or electronic parti- tioning of the molecular structure represented by the molecular structure represen- tation, - causing a quantum computer to generate and provide a quantum computational so- lution for at least one of the two or more sub-representations and for causing a clas- sical computer to generate and provide a classical computational solution for the remaining one or more sub-representations, - generating one or more intermediate properties associated with the molecular struc- ture by combining the solution of the two or more sub-representations, wherein an intermediate property is an electronic property of the electronic structure of the mo- lecular structure, - generating a technical application property associated with the chemical product based on the one or more intermediate properties, wherein the technical application property refers to a measurable chemical and/or physical quantity associated with the molecular structure, and - providing the technical application property associated with a controlling and/or mon- itoring process of a chemical production process associated with the chemical prod- uct. 

15. A computer program product for generating a technical application property associ- ated with a chemical product, wherein the computer program product is configured for caus- ing an apparatus according to any of claims 1 to 12 to perform the method according to claim 14.
